about.title: About Me
about.p1: With over 5 years of experience as a full-stack developer, I specialize in building scalable architectures and optimizing performance, with a strong focus on frontend technologies.
about.p2: I am passionate about solving complex technical challenges and mentoring developers to align technical execution with business outcomes. My goal is to create applications that enhance user experience and efficiency through collaborative leadership and innovative problem-solving.

chat.initial_message: Hi! I'm Burak's AI assistant. Ask me anything about his experience or skills!

projects.title: Engineering Case Studies & Public Build Work
projects.subtitle: Selected side projects presented as engineering case studies. Public previews are available, but these builds are still in progress and not production-ready.
projects.showcaseDescription: Compact product snapshots of side projects shared as public preview builds, with the engineering constraints and tradeoffs foregrounded over launch polish.

ritualgymtracker.summary: Offline-first workout tracking focused on guest migration, streak correctness, and timezone-safe analytics.

bookmarkanalyzer.summary: Bookmark workflow case study around AI enrichment, SSRF defense, and sanitized reader flows.

subtrackerrr.summary: Subscription management case study centered on financial correctness, auth safety, and persistence integrity.

fintrackerrr.summary: Portfolio analytics case study focused on normalized asset data, dividend insights, and large-table UI performance.
